task_completion.description: Verify that the base 'TRACI 2.1' method is available in the LCA software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LCIA methods list, navigation tree, or import dialog in the LCA software displays 'TRACI 2.1'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the custom method named 'TRACI 2.1 (IPCC AR6 Modified)'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LCIA methods list or an open method window shows the exact name 'TRACI 2.1 (IPCC AR6 Modified)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the characterization factor for Methane is updated to 29.8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the characterization factors table for the 'TRACI 2.1 (IPCC AR6 Modified)' method, the row for 'Methane' (Emission to air) shows a value of 29.8.

task_completion.description: Verify the characterization factor for Nitrous oxide is updated to 273.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the characterization factors table for the 'TRACI 2.1 (IPCC AR6 Modified)' method, the row for 'Nitrous oxide' (Emission to air) shows a value of 273.

task_completion.description: Verify the updates are documented in the specified log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file viewer shows a file named 'ar6_update_log.txt' located in the '~/LCA_Results' directory, containing text that documents the methane and nitrous oxide updates.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with actual LCA software to modify the method.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a genuine LCA software interface (e.g., openLCA) being used to duplicate and edit the method, rather than just a script or database editor.

integrity.description: Verify the characterization factors were actually entered into the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 29.8 and 273 are clearly visible inside the data grid/table of the LCA application, not just typed into the log file.

integrity.description: Verify the log file is not just a copy-paste of the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'ar6_update_log.txt' file contains descriptive text or a summary of the updates made, rather than just the exact task description pasted verbatim.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target custom method name is exactly 'TRACI 2.1 (IPCC AR6 Modified)'. The target characterization factor for 'Methane' (Emission to air) is 29.8, and for 'Nitrous oxide' (Emission to air) is 273. These values correspond to the official IPCC AR6 GWP100 values. The log file must be saved at '/home/ga/LCA_Results/ar6_update_log.txt'.
